title: Pokecentral Cobblemon
description: This is the official Pokecentral Cobblemon Modpack!
body:
# Pokecentral Cobblemon – Official Modpack
Welcome to the official modpack of Pokecentral Cobblemon, the premiere Cobblemon experience. Built specifically for our server, this pack ensures seamless compatibility and optimized performance for all players.

Whether you're exploring the overworld, catching your first Pokémon, or diving into high-level raids and battles, this modpack includes everything you need to play—no extra setup required.

## Key Features
Cobblemon – A modern, lightweight Pokémon mod built for Fabric

Fabric API – Required library for mod support

Jade – See in-game information about Pokémon, items, and blocks

Xaero's Minimap – Discover and navigate with a customizable minimap

JEI (Just Enough Items) – Browse recipes and item details with ease

Full Brightness Toggle – Instantly brighten dark areas

Performance Mods – Includes Lithium and other lightweight optimizations

### Why Use This Modpack?
This pack is curated and maintained by the Pokecentral team to offer the best possible experience on our server. It removes the guesswork just install and join. Perfect for new players, veterans, or content creators looking for an optimized Cobblemon setup.

### Need Help?
If you run into issues or need assistance, visit our website or join our official Discord community for support.
